codeReview.summary: The fix directly resolves the original traceability blocker: unlike the failed feature (which pointed to docs-only commit 137ad4b5e804b1ddb28c2144d211a40e489689b2), the new handoff references implementation commit 28ccfc60b41c847500d0deb7cf435b1701f10d3f, whose diff adds a concrete portability proof test (`test_portability_traceability_proof`) with runtime assertions and explicit full implementation SHA evidence in-code.

summary: Pass. Reviewed prior failure context, original failed diff, fix transcript skeleton, and fix diff. The fix provides implementation-level traceability evidence and concrete backfill portability assertions, fully addressing the original blocking finding.
